lines.english: The One Lord is his Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan ke sabh kaaj savaar |
lines.english: all his affairs are resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਪੜਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: jan naanak aparr na saakai koe |4|4|17|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, no one can equal him. ||4||4||17||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
We should feel sad, if we forget the Lord.
We should feel sad, if God were beyond us.
In love and attachment to Maya, the mortals are sad, and are consumed by sadness.
But why should we feel sad? The Lord is pervading everywhere. ||1||
We should feel sad, if we are in love with duality.
We should feel sad, if there were another Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕੜੀਐ ਜੇ ਅਨਿਆਇ ਕੋ ਮਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tau karreeai je aniaae ko marataa |
lines.english: We should feel sad, if someone dies by injustice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਖਪਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai bhram bhram bhram khapiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Name, they wander and wander and wander, and waste away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕੜੀਐ ਜੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: tau karreeai je kichh jaanai naahee |
lines.english: We should feel sad, if something were not known to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕੜੀਐ ਜੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ਧਿਙਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: tau karreeai je kichh hoe dhingaanai |
lines.english: We should feel sad, if God were a tyrant.
But why should we feel sad? The Lord is totally permeating everywhere. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਕਾੜਾ ਛੋਡਿ ਅਚਿੰਤ ਹਮ ਸੋਤੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tab kaarraa chhodd achint ham sote |3|
lines.english: So I have abandoned sadness, and I now sleep without anxiety. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕਹਿਆ ਜੋ ਹੋਇ ਸਭੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kahiaa jo hoe sabh prabh te |
lines.english: The Guru says that whatever happens is all by God's Will.
We should feel sad, if He made us suffer by mistake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੂਹੈ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh toohai tthaakur sabh ko teraa |
lines.english: O God, You alone are my Lord and Master; all belong to You.
According to Your Will, You pass judgement.
Please save Nanak's honor; I have come to Your Sanctuary. ||4||5||18||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
There is no other at all; the One Lord is permeating and pervading everywhere.
Without music, how is one to dance?
Without strings, how is a guitar to be played?
Without a voice, how is one to sing?
Without the Naam, all affairs are useless. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kaise paar pariaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, how can anyone cross over to the other side? ||1||Pause||
Without the Naam - tell me: who has ever been saved?
Without eyes, how can anyone see?
Without a tongue, how can anyone speak?
Without ears, how can anyone hear?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਨਰੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਲੇਖੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam binaa nar kahee na lekhai |2|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the mortal is of no account at all. ||2||
Without learning, how can one be a Pandit - a religious scholar?
Without understanding, how can the mind become steady?
Without power, what is the glory of an empire?
Without detachment, how can one be a detached hermit?
Without the Naam, the whole world is insane. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਉ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਕਹਾ ਕੋਊ ਤਿਆਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin hau tiaag kahaa koaoo tiaagee |
lines.english: Without renouncing egotism, how can anyone be a renunciate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬਸਿ ਪੰਚ ਕਹਾ ਮਨ ਚੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bin bas panch kahaa man choore |
lines.english: Without overcoming the five thieves, how can the mind be subdued?
Without the Guru's Teachings, how can anyone obtain spiritual wisdom?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਝੂਰੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam binaa sad sad hee jhoore |4|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the mortal regrets and repents forever and ever. ||4||
Says Nanak, this is the wisdom of the Lord's Court. ||5||6||19||
Without the Fear of God, all speech in useless.
Without seeing - tell me: how can anyone visualize in meditation?
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The disease of sexual desire overwhelms the elephant.
Mankind is afflicted with the disease of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਰਹਿਤ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜੋਗੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rog rahit meraa satigur jogee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only my True Guru, the True Yogi, is free of disease. ||1||Pause||
Because of the disease of vision, the moth is burnt to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਸੋ ਰੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo deesai so so rogee |
lines.english: Whoever I see is diseased.
Because of the disease of the sound of the bell, the deer is lured to its death. ||1||
Because of the disease of smell, the bumble bee is destroyed.
Because of the disease of taste, the fish is caught.
In the disease of the three qualities, corruption is multiplied. ||2||
The whole world is caught in the disease of attachment.
In disease the mortals die, and in disease they are born.
In disease they wander in reincarnation again and again.
